title: 3D-Printed Low-Poly Mesh Panel for NZXT H510 Elite – Better Airflow
excerpt: Enhance your NZXT H510 Elite with a 3D-printed low-poly panel for better airflow and a unique look. Follow this guide to print, and assemble your front panel.
content: If you're looking to improve airflow for your NZXT H510 Elite case while adding a custom aesthetic, this 3D-printed low-poly front mesh panel is a great project. I designed a frame and assembled the rest of the pieces using hot glue. Once printed, all the parts fit together like a puzzle for an easy and satisfying build. ? **Download the 3D Files on Thingiverse:** [https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6975045](https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6975045) ## **Step 1: Printing the Frame Pieces** {#step-1-printing-the-frame-pieces} You'll need to print the following frame components: - **Side-L1** - **Side-L2** - **Side-R1** - **Side-R2** - **Top** - **Bottom** **Printing Orientation:** - Ensure the **flange** is positioned on the top. - The **magnet holes** should be facing downward. When assembled, the flange should sit flush against the frame of the case. ![](/images/2025/03/image.png) --- ## **Step 2: Assembling the Frame** {#step-2-assembling-the-frame} 1. **Test Fit** – Before gluing, dry-fit all the pieces together to ensure alignment. 2. **Apply Hot Glue** – Once satisfied, glue each piece one at a time for a secure fit. 3. **Positioning the Polygon Pieces** – The low-poly panels should fit along the flange. ![](/images/2025/03/DmqQ12ysSTWDZGBglkX53A.jpg) --- ## **Step 3: Printing the Low-Poly Panels** {#step-3-printing-the-low-poly-panels} Next, print the polygonal design pieces labeled **P1 - P9**. ### **Printing Orientation:** {#printing-orientation} - Print **with the flange slot facing down**. - Disable the **top and bottom layers** in your slicer settings (see below). ![](/images/2025/03/image-1.png) --- ### **Print Settings for Bambu Labs Printers** {#print-settings-for-bambu-labs-printers} 1. Open **Bambu Slicer**. 2. Go to the **Strength** tab. 3. Set **Top Shell Layers** and **Bottom Shell Layers** to **0**. 4. Choose a **Sparse Infill Pattern** for different mesh designs. ![](/images/2025/03/image-2.png) ## **Shopping List** {#shopping-list} To complete this project, you'll need the following: - ? **10x1mm Magnets** – [Amazon Link](https://amzn.to/4hjpYJr) - ? **10x2mm Magnets** – [Amazon Link](https://amzn.to/3DwuXsm) - ? **Hot Glue Gun** – [Amazon Link](https://amzn.to/4ifZtpx) - ? **Super Glue** – [Amazon Link](https://amzn.to/4ixBOk4) --- This project not only enhances your PC's cooling but also gives it a unique, custom look. If you try this build, share your results in the comments or tag me on social media!
